description: Recto: Letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Mentions a number of people with grand titles, such as Saniyy al-Dawla b. al-Nezer Tāj al-Kuttāb and Tāj al-Dīn. The content of the letter is not clear. Some phrases: "I sent with the wife of.... and his brother with urging you...  inform me of all your news... present with you tomorrow or... when you come into the city..."
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
